category_sources: source_facts.description says DiceBear is an avatar library for designers and developers; official DiceBear docs describe generating avatars with the CLI.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub organization and repository use the display name DiceBear; source_facts.name is dicebear.
docs_sources: Official DiceBear documentation has a dedicated CLI page under how-to-use/cli.
repo_sources: Official DiceBear GitHub organization pins dicebear/dicebear as the public project; source_facts.homepage points to the same repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies avatar generation; official CLI documentation describes creating avatars and output formats such as svg, png, jpg, webp, avif, and json.
